From today to BigChange

How One Central Property Maintenance runs today, and how it runs on BigChange

Drawn from your demo on 2 June. The left shows how the work flows today across paper, Xero and the insurer portals. The right shows the same work on one platform.

Current Paper, Xero & portals
Future One BigChange platform
Your systems
CurrentAn in-house custom build for logging and scheduling, plus a separately built mobile app.
FutureOne platform for scheduling, jobs, worksheets and reporting, supported and maintained for you.
Worksheets
CurrentEngineers send before and after photos and notes, with no enforced worksheets.
FutureStructured, enforced job sheets completed on site every time.
Per-job accounting
CurrentNo live view of spend, margin or markup per job.
FutureDashboards and AI showing spend, margin and markup on every job.
Customisation
CurrentChanges mean going back to a third-party dev team.
FutureModel your own processes onto the platform, configured with you.
The field
CurrentGangs working on the in-house app on their own devices.
FutureGangs on the BigChange app on their own devices (Apple or Android), no tablets needed.
Job range
CurrentReactive call-outs and large refurbishments tracked the same way.
FutureAll job types, £120 to £60k, scheduled and tracked in one place.
